# WKUserScriptInjectionTime.atDocumentStart

**Case**

A constant to inject the script after the creation of the webpage’s document element, but before loading any other content.

## Declaration

```swift
case atDocumentStart
```

## Script-Injection Times

- **WKUserScriptInjectionTime.atDocumentEnd**: A constant to inject the script after the document finishes loading, but before loading any other subresources.
